ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robotic_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the robotic system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robotic system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robotic system */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the robotic system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the robotic system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic system the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES robotic_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic system the dataset belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the dataset belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., movement, sensor readings) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "sample_rate" REAL /* Sample rate of the data collection */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES robotic_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "t" REAL /* Time of the data point */,
  "aDotUA" REAL /* aDotUA value */,
  "bDotUA" REAL /* bDotUA value */,
  "gDotUA" REAL /* gDotUA value */,
  "aUA" REAL /* aUA value */,
  "bUA" REAL /* bUA value */,
  "gUA" REAL /* gUA value */,
  "xUA" REAL /* xUA value */,
  "yUA" REAL /* yUA value */,
  "zUA" REAL /* zUA value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the reading belongs to */,
  "t" REAL /* Time of the reading */,
  "aDotSH" REAL /* aDotSH value */,
  "bDotSH" REAL /* bDotSH value */,
  "gDotSH" REAL /* gDotSH value */,
  "aSH" REAL /* aSH value */,
  "bSH" REAL /* bSH value */,
  "gSH" REAL /* gSH value */,
  "xSH" REAL /* xSH value */,
  "ySH" REAL /* ySH value */,
  "zSH" REAL /* zSH value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the quality metrics belong to */,
  "missing_values" REAL /* Percentage of missing values */,
  "outliers" REAL /* Percentage of outliers */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Level of noise in the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
